helium.name: Helium
helium.option.entity_culling.tooltip: Skip rendering entities beyond a set distance. Boosts FPS in crowded areas.
helium.option.entity_cull_distance.toolt: Max distance (blocks) to render entities. Lower = more FPS.
helium.option.block_entity_culling.toolt: Skip rendering distant block entities (chests, signs, etc). Big FPS boost.
helium.option.block_entity_cull_distance: Max distance (blocks) to render block entities. Lower = more FPS.
helium.option.particle_culling.tooltip: Skip distant particles. Improves FPS in particle-heavy scenes.
helium.option.particle_cull_distance.too: Max distance (blocks) to render particles. Lower = more FPS.
helium.option.particle_limiting.tooltip: Limit total particle count to prevent lag spikes in particle-heavy scenes.
helium.option.max_particles.tooltip: Maximum number of particles to render at once. Lower = more FPS in explosions.
helium.option.particle_priority.tooltip: When limiting, keep important particles (damage, crits) over ambient ones.
helium.option.particle_batching.tooltip: Batch similar particles for more efficient rendering.
helium.option.animation_throttling.toolt: Reduce texture animation updates for off-screen or distant blocks. Saves GPU time.
helium.option.fast_math.tooltip: Replace sin/cos/atan2 with faster approximations. Tiny accuracy loss, noticeable FPS gain.
helium.option.gl_state_cache.tooltip: Cache OpenGL state to skip redundant calls. Auto-disabled with ImmediatelyFast.
helium.option.gl_state_cache.tooltip.exp: [EXPERIMENTAL] Cache OpenGL state to skip redundant calls. May cause input latency or visual issues on some systems. Disabled by default.
helium.option.gl_state_cache.tooltip.and: Disabled on Android. GL State Cache is not compatible with OpenGL ES.
helium.option.accelerated_text.tooltip: Caches font glyph lookups to significantly speed up text rendering. Biggest impact on formatted text like chat, HUD, nametags, and debug screens.
helium.option.shader_uniform_cache.toolt: Caches glGetUniformLocation results per shader program. Eliminates repeated expensive GL calls for uniform lookups. Auto-invalidates on resource reload, title screen, and Iris shader changes.
helium.option.model_cache.tooltip: Cache baked block models in memory with LRU eviction. Reduces repeated model lookups.
helium.option.model_cache_size.tooltip: Maximum memory for cached block models. Higher = fewer cache misses, more RAM.
helium.option.memory_optimizations.toolt: Reduce garbage collection pauses by reusing objects and buffers.
helium.option.thread_optimizations.toolt: Prioritize render thread and optimize event polling for smoother frames.
helium.option.fast_startup.tooltip: Parallel class loading for faster game launch. No effect after startup.
helium.option.reduced_allocations.toolti: Pool Vec3d, Matrix4f, and other hot objects to reduce garbage collection pressure.
helium.option.auto_pause_on_idle.tooltip: Drop to low FPS after no mouse/keyboard activity. Saves power and reduces heat.
helium.option.idle_timeout.tooltip: Seconds of no activity before entering idle mode.
helium.option.idle_fps_limit.tooltip: FPS cap when idle. Lower = less power usage.
helium.option.network_optimizations.tool: Background resource processing for smoother network handling.
helium.option.object_deduplication.toolt: Aggressively deduplicates models, properties, NBTs, and block states to significantly reduce RAM usage.
helium.option.fast_server_ping.tooltip: Ping all servers simultaneously instead of one by one. Much faster server list loading.
helium.option.fast_ip_ping.tooltip: Skip reverse DNS lookups for servers with literal IP addresses. Saves 1-5 seconds when pinging or connecting to IP-based servers.
helium.option.preserve_scroll.tooltip: Don't reset the server list scroll position when you press refresh.
helium.option.direct_connect_preview.too: Show server info (MOTD, players, ping, icon) when typing in the Direct Connect screen.
helium.option.smooth_scrolling.tooltip: Enable smooth scrolling animations in lists and menus. Adds momentum and elastic bounce effects.
helium.option.window_style.tooltip: Apply Windows 11 visual effects to the game window. Requires Windows 11 build 22000+.
helium.option.window_style.tooltip.non_w: Windows 11 only. Not available on this platform.
helium.option.window_material.tooltip: The backdrop effect for the window titlebar. Tabbed gives a subtle tinted effect, Mica uses your wallpaper colors, Acrylic is translucent blur.
helium.option.window_corner.tooltip: Corner rounding style for the game window.
helium.option.fps_overlay.tooltip: Master toggle for the on-screen overlay.
helium.option.overlay_transparency.toolt: Background transparency of the overlay. 0 = fully transparent, 100 = opaque.
helium.option.show_fps_stats.tooltip: Display minimum, maximum, and average FPS statistics.
helium.option.native_memory.tooltip: Use off-heap memory for large buffers. Reduces GC pressure but uses more system RAM.
helium.option.native_memory_pool_size.to: Maximum MB of off-heap memory to allocate. Higher = more cache, more RAM usage.
helium.option.render_pipelining.tooltip: Experimental async culling. May improve FPS on multi-core systems. Can cause visual glitches.
helium.option.simd_math.tooltip: Use Java Vector API for batch math operations. Requires JDK with incubator modules.
helium.option.async_light_updates.toolti: Process light updates on background threads. May cause brief lighting flicker.
helium.option.packet_batching.tooltip: Batch outgoing network packets to reduce syscall overhead. Off by default.
helium.option.temporal_reprojection.tool: Reuse rendered data from previous frames. Reduces render cost but may cause ghosting.
helium.option.nvidia_optimizations.toolt: Enable parallel shader compile and driver hints. Auto-detected, only active on NVIDIA GPUs.
helium.option.amd_optimizations.tooltip: 256-byte buffer alignment and pinned memory hints. Auto-detected, only active on AMD GPUs.
helium.option.intel_optimizations.toolti: Extra aggressive GL state caching for Intel iGPUs. Auto-detected, only active on Intel GPUs.
helium.option.adaptive_sync.tooltip: Detect G-Sync/FreeSync and adjust frame pacing to reduce input latency.
Controls how frames are delivered to your display. Set to a specific refresh rate if Automatic doesn't match your monitor. Off disables the feature entirely.
helium.config.category.general.tooltip: Enable or disable the mod. Performance settings are in Sodium's video settings.
helium.config.enable.description: Turn Helium on or off. Requires a game restart to take effect.
helium.option.fullbright.tooltip: Remove all darkness. Press G to toggle quickly. Purely visual, no gameplay advantage on servers.
helium.option.fullbright_strength.toolti: Fullbright intensity level. 0 = no boost, 10 = maximum brightness (ignores all shadow and lightmap values).
helium.option.show_coordinates.tooltip: Display your X, Y, Z position in the overlay.
helium.option.show_biome.tooltip: Display the current biome name in the overlay.
helium.config.category.tools.tooltip: Export and import your Helium configuration.
helium.config.export.description: Save your current settings to helium-export.json in the config folder.
helium.config.import.description: Load settings from helium-export.json in the config folder. Overwrites current settings.
helium.config.category.developer.tooltip: Developer options for testing experimental optimizations and debugging.
helium.config.dev_mode.description: Enable developer mode for aggressive rendering optimizations and experimental features.
helium.config.dev_mode.tooltip: Enable developer mode for aggressive rendering optimizations including draw call batching, frustum cull tightening, and GPU command buffer optimization. Compatible with Sodium, Iris, and vanilla.
helium.option.fast_animations.tooltip: Reuse rotation objects for entity model animations. Reduces garbage collection pressure from frequent Quaternionf allocations.
helium.option.cached_enum_values.tooltip: Cache Direction.values() and other hot enum arrays to avoid thousands of array allocations per tick. Reduces GC pressure.
helium.option.fast_world_loading.tooltip: Reduce initial spawn chunk loading and allow cancelling the loading screen with ESC. Off by default.
helium.option.reflex.tooltip: GPU-synchronized frame pacing for lower input latency. Best on NVIDIA GPUs with timer query support.
helium.option.reflex.tooltip.fallback: Fallback low-latency mode using elapsed time queries. Works on AMD/Intel but not as precise as NVIDIA Reflex.
helium.option.fast_blit.tooltip: Use glBlitFramebuffer instead of shader-based copy for faster frame presentation.
helium.option.suppress_gl_errors.tooltip: Skip OpenGL error callback processing. Reduces CPU overhead but hides GL errors.
helium.option.pose_pooling.tooltip: Reuse MatrixStack entries instead of allocating new ones. Reduces GC pressure during rendering.
helium.option.fast_bamboo.tooltip: Skip expensive shade brightness calculation for bamboo blocks. Small FPS boost in bamboo-heavy areas.
helium.option.optimized_light.tooltip: Use faster hash map implementation for light level tracking. Improves light update performance.
helium.option.inactive_fps.tooltip: Lower FPS limit when the game window is not focused. Saves power and reduces heat.
helium.option.inactive_fps_limit.tooltip: Target FPS when window is unfocused. Lower = more power savings.
helium.option.instant_lang.tooltip: Skip full resource reload when changing language. Much faster language switching.
helium.option.leaf_mode.tooltip: Controls how hidden leaf faces are culled. OFF disables culling. FAST culls all adjacent leaf faces. VERTICAL only culls top/bottom. STATE uses block distance property. CHECK culls fully surrounded leaves. GAP culls based on gap depth. DEPTH culls based on depth from air. RANDOM uses probabilistic culling.
helium.option.leaf_cull_depth.tooltip: Depth parameter for Gap, Depth, and Random leaf culling modes. Higher = more aggressive culling.
helium.option.mangrove_roots_culling.too: Apply leaf culling to mangrove roots as well. Improves FPS in mangrove swamps.
helium.option.sign_text_culling.tooltip: Don't render sign text on the side facing away from the camera. Reduces draw calls near many signs.
helium.option.rain_culling.tooltip: Skip rendering precipitation columns outside the camera frustum. Improves FPS during rain and snow.
helium.option.beacon_beam_culling.toolti: Skip rendering beacon and end gateway beams that are outside the camera frustum.
helium.option.painting_culling.tooltip: Skip rendering the back face of paintings when placed against a solid block.
helium.option.item_frame_culling.tooltip: Skip rendering item frames that are too far away or facing away from the camera.
helium.option.item_frame_lod.tooltip: Reduce item frame rendering detail at distance. Skips rendering items in distant frames.
helium.option.item_frame_lod_range.toolt: Maximum distance (blocks) to render item frame contents. Beyond this, frames are not rendered.
helium.option.hotbar_optimizer.tooltip: Send hotbar slot changes to the server immediately instead of waiting for the next tick. Reduces ghost totems and improves attribute swapping. Auto-disabled on flagged servers.
helium.option.hotbar_multi_switch.toolti: Allow sending multiple hotbar slot sync packets within a single game tick. Off by default because some anticheats may flag this.
helium.option.smooth_hotbar.tooltip: Smoothly animate the hotbar selector when switching slots. Uses exponential easing for a fluid, satisfying feel.
helium.option.force_skin_parts.tooltip: Always show your skin layers based on your client skin options. Also auto-refreshes skin parts on dimension change and respawn.
helium.option.async_pack_reload.tooltip: Reload resource packs in the background without freezing the game. Removes the full-screen loading overlay and keeps gameplay smooth.
helium.option.menu_framerate_limit.toolt: Override the 60 FPS cap on title and loading screens. Off uses vanilla behavior (60 FPS cap). Set a value to use that FPS limit on menus instead.
helium.option.joml_fast_math.tooltip: Enable JOML's internal fast math optimizations via system property. Speeds up all matrix and vector operations used by the rendering engine. Requires game restart to take effect.
helium.option.gl_context_upgrade.tooltip: Request OpenGL 4.6 context instead of 3.2. Enables modern GL features like Direct State Access. Falls back to 4.1 on macOS. Requires game restart to take effect.
helium.option.fast_random.tooltip: Replace the default Box-Muller gaussian random generator with a Ziggurat algorithm using pre-computed lookup tables. Faster random number generation for particles, world gen, and entity AI. Requires game restart.
helium.option.direct_state_access.toolti: Use OpenGL 4.5 Direct State Access for buffer and framebuffer operations. Reduces GL state changes by operating on objects directly without binding. Requires GL 4.5+ capable GPU. Requires game restart.
helium.option.renderbuffer_depth.tooltip: Use a Renderbuffer Object for depth attachment instead of a texture. Slightly faster for depth-only operations. Incompatible with Iris shaders. Requires game restart.
helium.option.one_click_crafting.tooltip: Automatically shift-click crafted items from the result slot into your inventory when using the recipe book. Also works with the stonecutter. Right-click a recipe to craft one, shift-click to craft a stack, hold drop key to drop instead.
